FATEBRINGER.KeybindingHint: Randomly selects from your controlled tokens with a divine blessing message. GM only. Configure in Settings → Controls.
FATEBRINGER.HotkeyHint: Press this key to invoke divine intervention and randomly choose from your selected tokens.
FATEBRINGER.SelectTokens: You must choose at least 1 token before divine selection can occur.

EnableDivineSelection.Name: Enable Divine Selection
EnableDivineSelection.Hint: Enables the Divine Selection feature. When disabled, the keybinding will have no effect and the feature is completely inert.

EnableCriticalTables.Name: Enable Critical Tables
EnableCriticalTables.Hint: Enables the Critical Tables feature. When disabled, no crit/fumble roll tables or active effects will trigger on any roll.

DeityConfig.Name: Deity Configuration
DeityConfig.Hint: Configure divine beings, their titles, and avatar images.

CustomMessages.Name: Custom Messages
CustomMessages.Hint: Configure divine intervention messages used during divine selection.

CriticalTablesConfig.Name: Critical Tables Configuration
CriticalTablesConfig.Hint: Configure roll tables for critical hits and fumbles.

TableEnhancements.Name: Table Result Enhancements
TableEnhancements.Hint: Per-result Active Effect and Macro automation for roll tables.

DivineSelectionConfig.Name: Configure Divine Selection
DivineSelectionConfig.Label: Configure
DivineSelectionConfig.Hint: Configure deities and divine intervention messages.

CriticalTablesConfig.Name: Configure Critical Tables
CriticalTablesConfig.Label: Configure
CriticalTablesConfig.Hint: Configure roll tables and active effects for critical hits and fumbles.

CriticalTables.InvalidTable: Invalid table — UUID does not point to a RollTable
CriticalTables.Disabled: Critical Tables is disabled in module settings
CriticalTables.EnhanceNoUuid: Enter a Roll Table UUID first, then click Enhance.
CriticalTables.EnhanceInvalidTable: That UUID does not point to a valid RollTable.

TableEnhancements.Title: Table Result Enhancements
TableEnhancements.LoadFailed: Could not load RollTable. Check the UUID and try again.

TargetSelector.Title: Select Targets
TargetSelector.NoActors: No actors found on the current scene.

Errors.TableProcessFailed: Zawkey's Fatebringer: Failed to process table
Errors.RollNoResult: Roll failed to produce a result
Errors.NoTableResult: No table result found for roll
Errors.OwnerOnly: Only the character owner or GM can roll this table
Errors.FeatureDisabled: This Zawkey's Fatebringer feature is currently disabled in settings
